name: Stoli 24x36 Garage Shed Plan - A Three-Bay Garage with Rustic Modern Charm
open_features: A large footprint designed to house multiple vehicles, project stations, tools, equipment, and seasonal gear with ease.
Simple framing, clear instructions, and clean architectural lines make it a smooth build for beginners and experienced builders alike.
Three wide panel-style garage doors with upper windows provide convenient vehicle entry and enhance natural light inside.
Rich horizontal wood siding, stone wainscot accents, white trim, and a bold dark roof deliver a warm yet contemporary look.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Stoli Garage Shed Plan - a 24x36 multi-bay garage and workshop design built for efficiency, beauty, and everyday utility. Featuring a tall gable roof, warm natural wood siding, stone wainscoting, and three classic panel-style garage doors, the Stoli blends rustic appeal with a clean, modern finish. Whether you're building a three-car garage, a spacious workshop, a property maintenance hub, or an organized storage studio, the Stoli 24x36 offers gen...
